message:
fix(sync): prevent waiter ID overflow panic and add RwLock FIFO fairness

Address two correctness issues in the synchronization primitives:

1. Waiter ID overflow: replace next_waiter_id += 1 with wrapping_add(1)
   in Mutex (3 sites) and RwLock (4 sites) to prevent panic on overflow
   in long-running systems that acquire locks billions of times

2. RwLock writer/reader fairness: when releasing a write lock with both
   writers and readers waiting, compare waiter IDs (arrival order) to
   decide whether to wake the next writer or pending readers, ensuring
   FIFO fairness across lock types instead of always preferring writers.
   Applied in both release_write and WriteFuture::drop paths.

Also includes a minor clarity refactor in pool.rs AcquireFuture::drop,
splitting the waiter position lookup into explicit steps with a type
annotation on the waker binding.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
